race.comment: STRANGLEHOLD (2) lightly raced gelding heading in the right direction. Bounced off his good first-up third with a commanding victory over 1400m at Gold Coast. Can keep the ball rolling in the testing conditions. HIGHLAND HUSTLE (11) was a good winner two-back over the 1800m, then struggled to see the 2200m out with a tiring seventh at Grafton. Kept fresh and deserves another chance back in trip and grade. REDADEL (5) indicated a win was imminent two-back when second here over 2217m. Took control early and never troubled with a solid win as favourite over 2105m at Tuncurry. Freshened up and adept in all conditions. ZOU BIG BOY (1) tough gelding due for a change of luck. Shouldered the 63kg with a courageous on-pace second over 1600m at Grafton. Kept up to the mark with a recent trial over 800m at Coffs Harbour. Cannot be taken lightly with the 3kg claim.
